name: createos
description: NodeOps CreateOS plugins for Claude Code — disposable sandbox compute and live dev sessions.

plugins.name: createos-sandbox
plugins.description: Run ad-hoc/heavy/untrusted code in disposable CreateOS microVMs; offload, parallel fanout, scratch shell, reusable box with sync, port tunnel, public expose, network clusters, S3 disks, WireGuard VPN, and fork.
